classes.name: simple_log_helper.logger_manager.LoggerManager

methods.name: simple_log_helper.logger_manager.LoggerManager.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the LoggerManager with optional configuration.

Args:
    config (dict, optional): Configuration dictionary for the logger manager.

methods.name: simple_log_helper.logger_manager.LoggerManager.get_logger
documentation:
Retrieve a logger by name, creating it if it doesn't exist.

Args:
    name (str): The name of the logger.

Returns:
    CustomLogger: The logger instance.

methods.name: simple_log_helper.logger_manager.LoggerManager.set_log_level
documentation:
Set the logging level for all managed loggers.

Args:
    level (str): The logging level to set.

methods.name: simple_log_helper.logger_manager.LoggerManager.configure
documentation:
Configure the LoggerManager with a configuration dictionary.

Args:
    config (dict): The configuration dictionary.

methods.name: simple_log_helper.logger_manager.LoggerManager.shutdown
documentation: Cleanly shut down all managed loggers by closing their handlers.

methods.name: simple_log_helper.logger_manager.LoggerManager._get_effective_level
documentation:
Determine the effective logging level between global and logger-specific levels.

Args:
    logger_specific_level (str): The logger-specific logging level.

Returns:
    int: The effective logging level as an integer.

methods.name: simple_log_helper.logger_manager.LoggerManager._get_log_level
documentation:
Convert a logging level name to its corresponding numeric value.

Args:
    level_name (str): The name of the logging level.

Returns:
    int: The numeric value of the logging level.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the logging level name is invalid.
Manages multiple loggers with individual configurations.

classes.name: simple_log_helper.custom_logger.CustomLogger

methods.name: simple_log_helper.custom_logger.CustomLogger.__init__
documentation:
Initialize a CustomLogger instance.

Args:
    name (str): The name of the logger.
    log_filename (str): The file path for logging output.
    level (int): The logging level.

methods.name: simple_log_helper.custom_logger.CustomLogger._initialize_logger
documentation: Initialize the logger by setting up file and console handlers.

methods.name: simple_log_helper.custom_logger.CustomLogger.setLevel
documentation:
Set the logging level.

Args:
    level (Any): The logging level as an integer or string.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the provided level is invalid.

methods.name: simple_log_helper.custom_logger.CustomLogger.show_progress
documentation:
Display a progress bar in the logs.

Args:
    progress (float): Progress percentage between 0 and 100.
    bar_length (int): The length of the progress bar.

methods.name: simple_log_helper.custom_logger.CustomLogger.log_function_call
documentation:
Decorator to log function calls and execution time.

Args:
    func (Callable): The function to be decorated.

Returns:
    Callable: The wrapped function.
A custom logger class that extends the standard logging.Logger with additional features.
